should_trigger.text: Operationalize this support escalation routine as a maintained skill and keep trigger eval coverage.
Take these SOP scraps, prompt notes, and transcript excerpts and formalize them into a reusable capability package.

should_not_trigger.text: Turn this workflow note into a wiki reference only, do not create any skill files, and keep it out of agent execution.
Explain the differences between prompts and skills in plain English.

near_neighbor.text: Sketch a future skill outline from these notes, but stop before generating files.
Review this process and suggest improvements for later; no packaging yet.
